3_local_coding_model.goal: Use a local open-source coding lane before paid API keys are required.
next: Expose model lane labels in the desktop UI.
Add one-click local lane smoke test.
Keep API model fallback for ambiguous or high-risk tasks.

4_journey_kits.goal: Use Journey Kits as inspectable workflow packs, not auto-installed code.
next: Render Ops Workflow readiness in the product surface.
Keep ops workflow execution dry-run only until local-write semantics are approved.
Add Journey Kit contract validation before visual-builder work.

5_productized_demo.goal: Turn the demo into a product surface with run history and exports.
next: Render Product App manifest readiness in the product surface.
Keep API exposure set to none until auth, cost, and logging gates are approved.
Consolidate stage artifacts into export bundles.
